package.name: pyramid_msgs
package.description: Native ROS2 interface definitions (.msg/.srv) generated from the canonical PYRAMID .proto contracts. This is the typed, introspectable ROS2 surface that replaces the opaque PclEnvelope pass-through. The .msg/.srv files themselves are generated into the build tree (not committed); this package runs them through rosidl. See doc/plans/PYRAMID/transport_plugins_wip.md.
